meta.title: A Day in the Life of a CCS Student
meta.description: Navigate the pressures of a Computer Science curriculum at AUF.

start.text: Anya looks at the flickering terminal. "The response time is abysmal!" she exclaims, nervously tapping her mechanical keyboard. "The entire deployment is deadlocked. The pressure is suffocating."
start.speaker: Anya

dijkstra_path.text:
You methodically map out the shortest path to the core services. The nodes begin to stabilize as traffic is routed away from the congestion. Anya sighs in relief.

"Efficient routing saved us. But wait, what's that spike in the database logs?"
dijkstra_path.speaker: System

brute_force_path.text:
You spend hours combing through every single loop. The code is a mess, and while you find a few redundancies, the system is still sluggish. Anya looks disappointed.

"We need a more algorithmic approach, not just more eyes on the code."
brute_force_path.speaker: Anya

choices.label: Try to optimize with a proper algorithm.

hashmap_path.text:
By replacing the linear scans with O(1) lookups, the bottleneck disappears instantly. The terminal stops flickering. Anya flashes a quick, tired smile.

"Linear time was killing us. Constant time is the way to go."
hashmap_path.speaker: Anya

choices.label: Move on to Chapter 2: The Debugging Marathon.

end_demo.text:
The servers are stable for now, but the day is just beginning. In the distance, you can hear the faint hum of the server room air conditioning. Another challenge awaits tomorrow.

*To be continued...*
end_demo.speaker: Narrator

algorithms.title: DIJKSTRA'S SHORTEST PATH
algorithms.definition: An iterative algorithm that finds the shortest path between nodes in a weighted graph.
algorithms.useCase: Used primarily in network routing protocols and GPS navigation to calculate the fastest route.
